text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh nooo, I'm so scared! The results for the initial screening will be out
soon!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
C-c-calm down! At times like this, you should just imagine you're a
princess! And a princess never fails!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Goodness, you two... Panicking isn't going to change the results.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
She's right. We have to stay in buono, buono spirits! ♪ Why don't we
have something sweet to calm us down?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, I think the results have arrived.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let's open them on the count of three, everyone! One... two...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yay, we did it! We all passed the screening! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That just leaves the audition. Its details are kept secret each year, so
it'll be difficult to prepare for.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it just says, "The meeting location is Beauty Island. Please come
wearing a tracksuit!" What're we supposed to do with just that?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Beauty Island? If my princess intuition is on the mark, it must be a
high-class holiday resort! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There will be a fabulous castle-like hotel, a private beach for VIPs,
and maybe the chance to meet an incognito prince... It's going to be
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I don't think there'll be any princes at the audition. Probably not,
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh! You passed the initial screening?! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I expected no less from my wonderful daughter. ♪ I just know you'll
pass the audition with flying colors too!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Mother. Also, about the thing I asked for...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You mean the photo of me in my racewear? Of course I still have it!
I'll send it to you after I hang up. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes, it's exactly how I remember it. It sure takes me back.

text_block_list.name: Young Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wow! Your racewear for the Japanese Oaks is so pretty, Mother!

text_block_list.name: Young Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's so sparkly and dazzling, just like a wedding dress!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ It's a one-of-a-kind outfit created for me by a first-rate
designer!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
This magical outfit makes me the star of every race and concert I'm in.
I mesmerize everyone who sees me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
If you follow in my footsteps, there might come a time when you wear
an outfit that's just as wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Young Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Really?! Then when I grow up—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ah... Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober... What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Um, I just wanted to say thank you again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I was only able to enter the audition because you pushed me to do it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to thank me. I just told you the truth... that you're
worthy of recognition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That may be so, but thank you anyway.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: We'll be rivals at the audition, so don't expect me to go easy on you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I won't!
And so, on the day of the audition...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Beauty Island isn't a resort?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I never would've expected this! I wonder if this means Ms. Beauty's
more focused on a candidate's spirit than their charisma.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We'll be fine! Every one of you is super skilled and spirited, so I'm
sure we'll all do amazingly! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What's that sound? Is that a helicopter?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Bonjour! ☆ I'm the world-famous racewear designer, Beauty
Anshinzawa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Participants
text_block_list.text: Aaah! It's really her!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Merci beaucoup for the warm welcome! Now, let me explain
what your task is.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: To me, an Umamusume encountering her racewear is like a date with destiny, and their bond is like an engagement!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That's why the outfits I create are aaall modeled after wedding
dresses. ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
What do you think of when you hear the word "wedding"? Why, a
chapel of course!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Your challenge today will be a game of speed and survival. You must make it to that chapel across the way before anyone else. ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Those who can overcome the challenge while radiating beauty will be
rewarded with the chance to tell me what racewear means to them
with a beautiful proposal!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You pass if your vow sparks something within me! Those selected will
be the muses who will run in the unveiling race to showcase my
designs.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
While my job is to create racewear for my muses, it's my muses' job to
showcase the beauty of my creations during the race! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Copy that! ☆ I don't really understand what's going on, but we just
gotta reach that chapel up there, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Proposal aside, it's not going to be easy to traverse this wild
terrain...)

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now! Without further ado, let us commence the Beauty Dream Cup
model audition! Show me your brilliance! ☆

text_block_list.name: Participant A
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! What's this giant boulder doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Participant B
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Get away from me!

text_block_list.name: Participant C
text_block_list.text: This is impossible! I'm going home!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Wow! Everyone is doing their best to survive this ordeal! ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of beauty I'll be blessed with this year? ...Hehe, I
can't wait to see. ☆
